_comment: Model download manifest. Each entry is downloaded by scripts/download_models.py. Use 'url' for a direct download or 'hf_repo'+'hf_file' for a Hugging Face file. VERIFY every source before the event -- URLs and repo ids change. Leave 'url' and 'hf_repo' empty to skip an entry (e.g. the LLM, which you export via Genie in WSL).

entries.name: kokoro-tts-model
entries.note: Kokoro-82M v1.0 ONNX weights (~325 MB). Confirmed URL from the kokoro-onnx examples.

entries.name: kokoro-tts-voices
entries.note: Kokoro v1.0 voice pack. Confirmed URL from the kokoro-onnx examples.

entries.name: llama-3.2-3b-genai
entries.note: LLM for the NPU. Build the Genie/onnxruntime-genai QNN bundle in WSL per the plan doc and copy it here, OR set hf_repo to a prebuilt QNN genai model you have verified. Left empty on purpose.
